summary:
PROPHETIC VISIONS OF DEAD FISH AND EARTH DYNAMICS: Brandon recounts a vision of thousands of dead fish washing ashore along the California and Oregon coasts, which he interprets as a divine warning. He explains that these events are happening rapidly, shifting from taking years to manifest to occurring in days. Furthermore, Brandon shares insights regarding significant environmental shifts, including unprecedented earthquakes along the Ring of Fire, changes in the earth's crust due to an outside source, shifting magnetic poles, and rapidly altering weather patterns that will heavily impact global crop production and the changing of seasons.

OBEDIENCE AND SACRIFICIAL GIVING: Brandon shares a deeply personal test of faith regarding his finances. He and his wife Diana had been diligently saving money debt-free to remodel their bathrooms. However, during a night vision, God instructed Brandon to pray for a young man destined for ministry and to secretly donate his remodel savings to a youth group building project across the street. Despite a fierce internal struggle with his flesh and initial frustration with Diana's immediate willingness to comply, Brandon ultimately obeyed. He placed the check in the offering bucket anonymously, passing a crucial spiritual test designed to elevate him to the next level of his faith and ministry.

GEOPOLITICAL WARNINGS AND GLOBAL REVIVAL: Brandon issues urgent warnings about a rapidly approaching great war, emphasizing that the situation is incredibly fragile and that a major escalation involving Russia, Ukraine, North Korea, Cuba, and even Australia is on the horizon. He cautions leaders against provoking aggressive nations and urges continuous prayer to prevent an uncontrollable global conflict. Conversely, Brandon prophesies an enormous spiritual awakening worldwide, predicting the fall of the Iron Curtain in North Korea to allow a massive influx of salvation, alongside major revivals sweeping through Russia, Japan, China, South Korea, Africa, South America, and Europe. He also foresees a monumental move of God within the Catholic Church and a unifying revival across all Christian denominations.

HEALING MIRACLES AND FULL-TIME MINISTRY TRANSITION: Brandon highlights the power of faith through the miraculous progress of his autistic daughter, Megan, who is now able to attend church and visit the dentist after years of severe challenges. He attributes this to divine intervention and the influence of healing ministries. Furthermore, Brandon details his difficult transition into full-time ministry, which required him to abruptly abandon his lucrative dog-breeding business of over a decade and halt inventory purchases for his online sales ventures. Operating under a strong healing anointing, Brandon also calls out specific physical healings for viewers, including the dissolving of kidney stones, the clearing of neck arteries, the repair of heart valves, and the mending of leaky guts, while even prophesying the safe return of a lost dog through angelic assistance.

HEAVENLY VISIONS AND AFRICAN PERSECUTION: Brandon describes a profound spiritual experience where he was taken to the edge of heaven and witnessed massive storehouses filled with spare human body parts, financial blessings, and unique end-time spiritual mantles waiting to be dispatched to believers. In a contrasting and heavier vision, he witnesses the severe persecution of Christian women and children held hostage in a dirt hut in Africa by armed men. Brandon fervently intercedes for these captives, commanding angelic forces to protect the innocent, deliver justice to the oppressors, and bring ultimate peace and liberation to the persecuted village.
